title: Section 29
content: In the case of a work of an international organisation to which the provisions of section 41 apply, copyright shall subsist until 1[sixty years] from the beginning of the calendar year next following the year in which the work is first published.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 13 of 1992, s. 2, for "fifty years" (w.e.f. 28-10-1991).
